violations.text: The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Food Protection Manager. Establishment to register Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by tools and mop . A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as pita bread) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The door to the outside, located by restrooms, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
